"to Omega" is a term often used by [[Evolutionists]] at the end of prayers and blessings. It is a reference to [[Omega]] as the end goal which [[Lifeism]] is seeking.
[[Category:Omega]]
Sometimes the phrase is also used in terms such as "getting to Omega" which refers to getting a specific person to the [[Omega Point]] or Salvation, or often just getting one of the [[Three Fruits]].
[[Category:Omega]]
[[Category:Phrases]]

The phrase also refers to people dying or entering into cryostasis


It’s at the end of Immanuelles videos

==see also ==
* [[Hello Immortals]]

==references ==
[[Category:Immanuelle's Youtube Channel]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
